emailTemplate.body:
Dear Valued Client,
Your trade order has been confirmed and executed successfully.
Order Details: Order ID: ${orderId} Symbol: ${symbol} Action: ${side} Quantity: ${quantity} shares Price: $${price} per share
This order has been submitted to the exchange and will settle in accordance with standard T+3 settlement procedures.
If you have any questions regarding this trade, please contact your account representative or the BigCorp Trading Desk at 1-800-BIG-CORP (1-800-244-2677).
Thank you for choosing BigCorp Trading Services.
Regards, BigCorp Trade Operations
--- DISCLAIMER: This is an automated notification from BigCorp Trading Systems. This message is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. Please review your trade confirmation statement for official records. If you believe you received this message in error, please contact the Help Desk immediately at helpdesk@bigcorp.com.
